extendedQueries.sql: SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks ORDER BY tasks."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $1

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" order by "tasks"."createdAt" desc limit $1

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT organizations.id, organizations.name, organizations.slug, organizations.plan, organizations.settings, organizations."createdAt", organizations."updatedAt" FROM "public"."organizations" organizations WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."projects" projects_0 WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_1 WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id AND tasks_1.status = $1)) ORDER BY organizations.id ASC

SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks WHERE tasks.status = $1 ORDER BY tasks.id ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET $2

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" where "tasks"."status" = $1 order by "tasks"."id" asc limit $2 offset $3

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT projects.id, projects.name, projects.description, projects.color, projects.status, projects."isPublic", projects.budget, projects."startDate", projects."endDate", projects.metadata, projects."createdAt", projects."updatedAt", projects."organizationId", COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('id', tasks_0.id, 'title', tasks_0.title, 'description', tasks_0.description, 'status', tasks_0.status, 'priority', tasks_0.priority, 'position', tasks_0.position, 'dueDate', tasks_0."dueDate", 'completedAt', tasks_0."completedAt", 'estimatedHours', tasks_0."estimatedHours", 'metadata', tasks_0.metadata, 'createdAt', tasks_0."createdAt", 'updatedAt', tasks_0."updatedAt", 'projectId', tasks_0."projectId", 'assigneeId', tasks_0."assigneeId", 'creatorId', tasks_0."creatorId", 'milestoneId', tasks_0."milestoneId", 'parentId', tasks_0."parentId") AS row FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_0 WHERE tasks_0."projectId" = projects.id AND tasks_0.status = $1 ORDER BY tasks_0.id ASC LIMIT $2) AS tasks_row_1), '[]'::json) AS tasks FROM "public"."projects" projects ORDER BY projects.id ASC LIMIT $3

drizzleQueries.sql: select "pgProjects"."id", "pgProjects"."name", "pgProjects"."description", "pgProjects"."color", "pgProjects"."status", "pgProjects"."isPublic", "pgProjects"."budget", "pgProjects"."startDate", "pgProjects"."endDate", "pgProjects"."metadata", "pgProjects"."createdAt", "pgProjects"."updatedAt", "pgProjects"."organizationId", "pgProjects_tasks"."data" as "tasks" from "projects" "pgProjects" left join lateral (select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_array("pgProjects_tasks"."id", "pgProjects_tasks"."title", "pgProjects_tasks"."description", "pgProjects_tasks"."status", "pgProjects_tasks"."priority", "pgProjects_tasks"."position", "pgProjects_tasks"."dueDate", "pgProjects_tasks"."completedAt", "pgProjects_tasks"."estimatedHours", "pgProjects_tasks"."metadata", "pgProjects_tasks"."createdAt", "pgProjects_tasks"."updatedAt", "pgProjects_tasks"."projectId", "pgProjects_tasks"."assigneeId", "pgProjects_tasks"."creatorId", "pgProjects_tasks"."milestoneId", "pgProjects_tasks"."parentId") order by "pgProjects_tasks"."id" asc), '[]'::json) as "data" from (select * from "tasks" "pgProjects_tasks" where ("pgProjects_tasks"."projectId" = "pgProjects"."id" and "pgProjects_tasks"."status" = $1) order by "pgProjects_tasks"."id" asc limit $2) "pgProjects_tasks") "pgProjects_tasks" on true order by "pgProjects"."id" asc limit $3

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT users_t.id, users_t.email, users_t.name, users_t.avatar_url AS "avatarUrl", users_t.role, users_t.status, users_t.is_deleted AS "isDeleted", users_t.metadata, users_t.tags, users_t."lastLoginAt", users_t."createdAt", users_t."updatedAt" FROM "public"."users" users_t WHERE users_t.email LIKE $1 ORDER BY users_t.id ASC

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "email", "name", "avatar_url", "role", "status", "is_deleted", "metadata", "tags", "lastLoginAt", "createdAt", "updatedAt" from "users" where "users"."email" like $1 order by "users"."id" asc

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks ORDER BY tasks.status ASC, tasks.priority DESC, tasks."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $1

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" order by "tasks"."status" asc, "tasks"."priority" desc, "tasks"."createdAt" desc limit $1

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks WHERE tasks."createdAt" >= $1 AND tasks."createdAt" <= $2 ORDER BY tasks.id ASC LIMIT $3

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" where ("tasks"."createdAt" >= $1 and "tasks"."createdAt" <= $2) order by "tasks"."id" asc limit $3

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT organizations.id, organizations.name, organizations.slug, organizations.plan, organizations.settings, organizations."createdAt", organizations."updatedAt", COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('id', projects_0.id, 'name', projects_0.name, 'description', projects_0.description, 'color', projects_0.color, 'status', projects_0.status, 'isPublic', projects_0."isPublic", 'budget', projects_0.budget, 'startDate', projects_0."startDate", 'endDate', projects_0."endDate", 'metadata', projects_0.metadata, 'createdAt', projects_0."createdAt", 'updatedAt', projects_0."updatedAt", 'organizationId', projects_0."organizationId", 'tasks', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('id', tasks_1.id, 'title', tasks_1.title, 'description', tasks_1.description, 'status', tasks_1.status, 'priority', tasks_1.priority, 'position', tasks_1.position, 'dueDate', tasks_1."dueDate", 'completedAt', tasks_1."completedAt", 'estimatedHours', tasks_1."estimatedHours", 'metadata', tasks_1.metadata, 'createdAt', tasks_1."createdAt", 'updatedAt', tasks_1."updatedAt", 'projectId', tasks_1."projectId", 'assigneeId', tasks_1."assigneeId", 'creatorId', tasks_1."creatorId", 'milestoneId', tasks_1."milestoneId", 'parentId', tasks_1."parentId", 'comments', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id', comments_2.id, 'content', comments_2.content, 'isEdited', comments_2."isEdited", 'createdAt', comments_2."createdAt", 'updatedAt', comments_2."updatedAt", 'taskId', comments_2."taskId", 'authorId', comments_2."authorId", 'parentId', comments_2."parentId")), '[]'::json) FROM "public"."comments" comments_2 WHERE comments_2."taskId" = tasks_1.id), '[]'::json)) AS row FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_1 WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id ORDER BY tasks_1.id ASC LIMIT $1) AS tasks_row_3), '[]'::json)) AS row FROM "public"."projects" projects_0 WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id ORDER BY projects_0.id ASC LIMIT $2) AS projects_row_4), '[]'::json) AS projects FROM "public"."organizations" organizations ORDER BY organizations.id ASC LIMIT $3
